hub_records.label: Highest Single-Week Score
hub_records.name: Brandon, untouchable
hub_records.prose: Brandon dropped 188.74 on Trevor in week 1 of the 2021 season — the highest single-week output in league history.

hub_records.label: Biggest Blowout
hub_records.name: Devin over Trevor
hub_records.prose: Devin hung 150 on Trevor in week 2 of 2019, 110 points clear — the most lopsided result in league history.

hub_records.label: Longest Win Streak
hub_records.name: Jordan on a heater
hub_records.prose: Jordan ran off 10 straight wins — the longest unbroken stretch any manager has put together.

hub_records.label: Highest Season Total
hub_records.name: Tyler — "Crosstown Comets"
hub_records.prose: Tyler's 2025 "Crosstown Comets" piled up 1,864 regular-season points, averaging 133.2 a game.

hub_records.label: Closest Game Ever
hub_records.name: Ryan over Ethan
hub_records.prose: Ryan edged Ethan by 0.03 in week 11 of 2024 — the tightest margin on the books.

hub_records.label: Shootout (Highest Combined)
hub_records.name: Devin vs Cole
hub_records.prose: Devin and Cole combined for 335.9 in week 1 of 2023 — the highest-scoring matchup ever played.

hub_records.label: Longest Losing Streak
hub_records.name: Trevor's cold stretch
hub_records.prose: Trevor dropped 10 in a row — the longest cold stretch any manager has endured in league history.

hub_records.label: Best Regular Season Record
hub_records.name: Tyler — "Crosstown Comets"
hub_records.prose: Tyler's 2023 "Crosstown Comets" team went 12-2 in the regular season — the best single-season record in league history.
